    Fix ruff check failures reported:
    
    1) brokk_code/app.py: split long f-strings in add_system_message_markup calls around lines for executor started and Ready!/model lines so each line <=100.
    2) brokk_code/widgets/chat_panel.py: wrap/shorten the long comment at prefix line so <=100.
    3) tests/test_smoke.py:
      - Organize top-level imports (standard library: asyncio, pathlib, unittest.mock; third-party: httpx; local: brokk_code...). Ensure correct order and blank lines per ruff.
      - Fix F821 by importing ExecutorError from brokk_code.executor.
      - For the two tests that currently do local imports inside functions (MagicMock etc.), either keep but sorted or move to top in a ruff-compliant way. Ensure ruff I001 satisfied.
    
    Do not change README.md or AGENTS.md unless needed for goal (not needed). Run ruff check to confirm clean.
    
    If you need to propose changes to code you can't see, tell me their full class or file names and ask me to add them to the Workspace; end your reply and wait for my approval.
